risks.title: restore() called after error path may leave fs in partially patched state
risks.mitigation: Wrap restore() in finally block so it always runs even on exception

risks.title: Idempotent restore causes double-restore if orchestrator is re-used
risks.mitigation: Guard restore() with a _restored boolean flag; no-op on second call

decision_records.decision: Add restore() method to DryRunSemanticOrchestrator, call in finally block of processProject()/processFile()
decision_records.rationale: Minimal change, no public interface change, easy to test. Full DI refactor (IMP-CORE-087 body suggests as alternative) is out-of-scope for this WO.
